metadata.description: Generate Google Play Store mockup screenshots and Feature Graphics from any local codebase. v0.3.0 extracts the target app's actual visual style and applies it to in-device screen renders — without leaving the terminal.

plugins.name: snap-mock-skill
plugins.description: Point at a local project directory, get 6 ready-to-export Play Store mockup screenshots (1080×1920 PNG) plus a 1024×500 Feature Graphic. v0.3.0 reads the target app's actual styles (StyleSheet.create, theme files, LinearGradient JSX) and renders the in-device screens using THAT app's typography, colors, gradients, corner radii, and spacing — so mockups read as real screenshots of THAT specific app. Powered by Claude + headless Chromium + Konva. Bundles its own Next.js renderer.
